function.name: bsgfx_highlightMaterial
function.comment: These are kinda scuffed because they just brighten the color of the material - so calling it repeatedly will keep increasing it

function.name: bsgfx_shadowPipe
function.comment: Computes shadow volume geometry on the GPU

function.name: bsmod_add
function.comment: Creates an object of a given type (data can be NULL)
